description: Style NoteYour go-to brand for office essentials, arrow comes up with this stylish belt to add a refined finish to your corporate look. This belt is the right accessory for a formal office-ready look. Product DetailsBlack belt with a stitch running through it for styleSingle pronged metal buckle with a tang clasp and holes to customise the FitOne fixed loopMaterial and careLeatherWipe with a clean cloth to remove dust
